This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Common carotid artery structure (body structure), Left common carotid artery structure (body structure), Right common carotid artery structure (body structure), Structure of apex of heart (body structure), Structure of brachial artery (body structure)] and examples for no FSN: [Structure of left pulmonary artery])
